integrity.description: The agent used the Tor Browser to access the onion site.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Tor Browser UI (identifiable by its distinct branding and onion routing features) is used, rather than a standard web browser or curl command.

integrity.description: The agent used the browser's native save functionality to generate the complete HTML and asset folder.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's 'Save Page As' dialog is visible with the 'Webpage, Complete' (or similar) format selected, rather than manually creating files.

integrity.description: The agent actively inspected the asset directory to count the JavaScript files.
integrity.visual_evidence: A terminal window running a command like 'ls', 'find', or 'wc -l' inside the asset directory, or a file manager window open to the asset directory showing the downloaded files.
